idea: Consumer stress spike from weekly Google Trends on 'debt consolidation' searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'debt consolidation'

behavior: A sudden rise in debt consolidation interest signals rising consumer financial stress, often preceding reduced discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary sector suffers when consumers increase debt management concerns.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if weekly search interest rises more than 15% compared to prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if interest falls below 10% above 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data often shows spikes in consumer stress terms several times a year.

idea: Freight logistics squeeze from weekly FRED Producer Price Index for transportation rising faster than industrial PPI

data.source: FRED API: PPI Transportation and PPI Industrial

behavior: Rising transport PPI relative to industrial PPI signals cost pressure on logistics that may squeeze manufacturing margins.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector profitability pressured by rising freight costs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if Transportation PPI increases more than 1% week-over-week and exceeds Industrial PPI by 0.5%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when spread narrows below 0.3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly PPI data often shows transportation cost spikes aligned with supply chain disruptions.

idea: Labor jobs surge in temporary help services signals upcoming strength in industrial sector

data.source: FRED API: Temporary Help Services Employment

behavior: Rising temporary help employment often leads industrial production before permanent hires catch up.

market_impact.rationale: Temporary jobs growth indicates rising industrial activity and capacity ramp-up.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI if temporary help employment grows >0.5% week-over-week for two consecutive weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or if growth turns negative for a week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Temporary help employment data releases weekly and often show meaningful growth spurts.

idea: Local economy weirdness: sudden surge in municipal building permits signals real estate rebound
behavior: A jump in building permits indicates increased construction activity, often leading to real estate sector strength.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate benefits from construction activity acceleration.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLRE if weekly rate of building permits rises by more than 20% compared to 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 8 weeks or if permits decline below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Building permit data is regularly reported and reacts to seasonal and policy changes.

idea: Political insider selling spike in financial sector ETFs

data.source: Political insider filings aggregated weekly (public scrape)

behavior: Surge in insider selling in financial sector ETFs often precedes sector weakness due to anticipated regulatory or economic headwinds.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling signals reduced confidence in financial sector outlook.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if insider selling volume exceeds average by 30% over past 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if insider selling volume normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider filings frequently spike with sector regulatory fears.

idea: Macro input pressure: rapid increase in natural gas futures volatility signals energy sector rotation

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily price and volatility for natural gas futures

behavior: Spikes in natural gas volatility often precede energy sector price swings and rotation opportunities.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector volatility can trigger price rallies as markets price supply shocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLE if daily volatility rises more than 25% day-over-day and closes above 5-day volatility average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if volatility falls below 5-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy volatility spikes multiple times per year driven by weather and geopolitical events.

idea: Consumer stress: weekly spike in Google Trends for 'layoff' searches during non-peak seasons

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'layoff'

behavior: Rising layoff search interest signals rising fear of unemployment, pressuring consumer discretionary stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Layoff concerns reduce consumer spending appetite.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if weekly 'layoff' search interest jumps 20% above 6-week average outside typical seasonal peaks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if interest declines below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Layoff search interest fluctuates frequently with economic news cycles.

idea: Travel mobility: weekly increase in Google Trends for 'road trip' searches signals leisure travel pickup

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'road trip'

behavior: Rising interest in road trips signals increased travel demand benefiting discretionary travel-related sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer leisure spending typically rises with travel interest.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if 'road trip' search interest rises at least 15% above 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if interest falls below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel interest spikes seasonally and with weather patterns, often multiple times per year.

idea: Attention sentiment: weekly surge in Google Trends for 'inflation hedge' searches indicates rising macro concern

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'inflation hedge'

behavior: Increasing search interest signals growing market concern about inflation, often leading to commodity sector rallies.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector benefits from inflation hedge demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLB if weekly 'inflation hedge' searches rise >20% above 6-week baseline
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if interest drops below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Inflation concern search interest fluctuates regularly with economic data and policy news.

idea: Local economy weirdness: weekly surge in municipal water consumption signals urban economic activity pickup

data.source: Public municipal water usage data aggregated weekly

behavior: Rising water consumption often precedes increased local economic activity, benefiting utilities and local real estate.

market_impact.rationale: Utility demand grows with urban activity and population movement.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLU if weekly water consumption rises >10% above prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or if consumption falls below 5% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Water consumption data shows meaningful weekly variation tied to urban economic cycles.

idea: Macro input pressure: weekly rise in steel futures volume signals industrial sector momentum

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly volume for steel futures

behavior: Increasing futures volume usually precedes price moves and signals growing industrial demand.

market_impact.rationale: Steel demand is a direct proxy for industrial activity strength.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI if weekly steel futures volume increases >20% compared to prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if volume drops below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Steel futures volume is volatile and spikes multiple times per year aligned with industrial cycles.

idea: Labor jobs: weekly surge in healthcare job postings signals biotech sector strength

data.source: FRED series or public job posting scrapes for healthcare sector

behavior: Rising healthcare job postings often precede earnings strength and sector outperformance.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare job growth signals innovation and capacity expansion.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLV if weekly healthcare job postings rise >15% above 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if job postings decline below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Healthcare job posting data reacts quickly to industry hiring cycles.

idea: Attention sentiment: daily spike in Google Trends for 'cyberattack' searches boosts cybersecurity ETF

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'cyberattack'

behavior: Rising cyberattack search interest reflects heightened threat perception, often lifting cybersecurity stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Cybersecurity sector benefits from elevated threat awareness.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLC if daily search interest jumps >30% day-over-day and exceeds 3-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 days or if search interest falls below 3-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cyberattack news causes daily search spikes multiple times per year.

idea: Freight logistics: weekly surge in railroad carload volume signals industrial demand pickup

data.source: Public weekly railroad carload volume data

behavior: Rising carload volumes indicate greater industrial throughput and economic activity.

market_impact.rationale: Railroad volumes correlate strongly with industrial production.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI if weekly carload volume rises >10% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if volume declines below 5% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Railroad carload data regularly fluctuates with industrial cycles.

idea: Macro input pressure: weekly jump in fertilizer prices signals agricultural sector rotation

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly prices for major fertilizer ETFs

behavior: Fertilizer price spikes often anticipate agricultural sector input cost pressures and supply chain shifts.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector benefits from commodity price momentum.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLB if fertilizer ETF prices rise >8% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when weekly gains fall below 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Fertilizer prices often jump due to seasonal and geopolitical factors.
